meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills to Finish Your SaaS MVP
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your product development. Master Claude Code skills and use Antigravity to ship your MVP faster. A beginner-friendly guide for SaaS founders.
content.answer_block: You aren't finishing projects because your execution loop is broken. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a high-velocity development partner. This setup automates technical debt, streamlines boilerplate generation, and keeps your focus on revenue-generating features rather than getting stuck in syntax hell.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is paved with 'almost finished' MVPs. You start with high-octane energy, but the friction of coding—debugging dependency conflicts, fighting boilerplate, and losing context—slows your momentum until the project simply stops. The dream of a profitable product begins to feel like a permanent debt.

But the game has changed. By treating Claude Code as an autonomous co-pilot and leveraging Antigravity for structural precision, you can collapse months of development into weeks. This isn't just about writing code; it’s about maintaining velocity. Let’s eliminate the blockers that keep you from launching.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a clean workspace where Claude Code can index your project architecture without hallucinating file structures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project directory and generate a technical roadmap that prioritizes the core monetization features first.

steps.title: Defining the Revenue Loop
steps.description: Identify the high-value user path and force Claude Code to build only what is required to reach the first transaction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Map out the minimal viable authentication and stripe integration flow for a B2B SaaS dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement stripe checkout flow focusing on simplicity and security'

steps.title: Rapid Iteration Cycles
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform bulk refactoring, ensuring your code remains lean and readable as you add features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current codebase to follow clean architecture principles, reducing complexity for future scaling.

steps.title: Automated Testing & Validation
steps.description: Stop manual testing. Generate tests that validate your business logic before you push to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write comprehensive unit tests for the primary checkout logic to ensure zero-fail transaction processing.

steps.title: Deployment Readiness
steps.description: Package your MVP for production deployment, ensuring environment variables and secrets are handled securely.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the project for security vulnerabilities and prepare a production-ready dockerfile for deployment.

pro_tips: Always define your 'Definition of Done' in a .claudeignore file to prevent the AI from over-engineering features you don't need.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to keep the business objective context persistent across multiple CLI sessions.
Treat every Antigravity prompt as a board-level briefing; be specific about business outcomes, not just code snippets.
Force-limit your project scope to a single feature per Claude CLI session to prevent context window dilution.
Run periodic 'sanity checks' where you ask Claude to explain the code it just wrote; if it can't explain the business logic clearly, it's too complex.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is functional, focus on user acquisition. Do not add new features until you have your first ten paying customers.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the strategy, and the roadmap. The only thing missing is your commitment to launch. Stop tinkering and start shipping—your future revenue depends on the code you push today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
